title: Listening - Part 3
description: For each question, write the correct answer in the gap. Write one or two words or a number or a date or a time.
instructions: You will hear one person giving information. For questions 14–19, write the correct answer in the gap.
context: You will hear a teacher giving information about a school trip to a science centre.
form_title: School trip to the science centre
audio_script: Woman: Listen carefully, everyone, because I need to give you the final details for tomorrow’s school trip to the science centre. We’re not going by train as we first planned. A [14]coach[/14] will collect us from outside the school gates. It will leave at [15]eight twenty[/15], so please arrive by eight ten at the latest. The first exhibition we’ll visit is about [16]space[/16]. Some of you asked about the robot show, but that is closed tomorrow, so we’ll see it another time. For lunch, please bring [17]sandwiches[/17]. There is a café at the centre, but it’s small and usually crowded with other schools. After lunch, you’ll have twenty minutes in the [18]gift shop[/18]. Don’t spend all your money there, as many things are quite expensive. We should be back at school at about four o’clock. The cost of the trip is [19]ten[/19] pounds, which includes travel and entry to the science centre. If you haven’t paid yet, please bring the money tomorrow morning in an envelope with your name on it. I’m sure it will be a really interesting day. You will need a notebook because there are some questions to answer during the visit. They are easy, but they will help you remember the most important things. Please stay with your group leader in each room, and do not touch any machines unless a member of staff says it is allowed. If you feel unwell during the day, tell an adult immediately. We will call parents only if it is necessary.  The centre has a quiet room near the entrance if anyone needs a short break from the busy exhibitions.

note_sheet.section: School trip to the science centre

questions.explanation: The speaker says a coach will collect the students from outside the school gates.
The speaker says the coach will leave at eight twenty.
The speaker says the first exhibition they will visit is about space.
The speaker tells students to bring sandwiches for lunch.
The speaker says students will have twenty minutes in the gift shop.
The speaker says the trip costs ten pounds.
